title: cynanchum triangulare
intro: Cynanchum triangulare, also known as the Triangular Milkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Cynanchum triangulare include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, and act as an immunomodulator. In traditional medicine, Cynanchum triangulare is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction from its aerial parts, which are believed to possess therapeutic properties.
